Table of Contents

Class BaseBusinessSqlRepository

Namespace
DAL.Impl
Assembly
DAL.dll

Base class for all business-domain SQL repositories. Extends BaseRepository with support for shared SqlConnection and SqlTransaction injection by UnitOfWork.

public class BaseBusinessSqlRepository : BaseRepository
Inheritance
object
BaseRepository
BaseBusinessSqlRepository
Derived
AgendaSqlRepository
BalanceSqlRepository
ClienteSqlRepository
ComprobanteSqlRepository
EjercicioSqlRepository
EspacioSqlRepository
MembresiaSqlRepository

RutinaEjercicioSqlRepository
RutinaSqlRepository
ClienteMembresiaSqlRepository
IngresoSqlRepository
Inherited Members
BaseRepository._connectionString
BaseRepository.ExecuteNonQuery(string, SqlParameter[], SqlConnection, SqlTransaction)
object.ToString()
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

When DAL.Impl.BaseBusinessSqlRepository.CurrentConnection is set (i.e., the repository is enrolled in a UoW transaction), the shadowed helper methods use the shared connection/transaction instead of opening a new one. When not enrolled, they fall back to the base class behaviour.

Constructors

BaseBusinessSqlRepository()

Initializes the repository using the BusinessConnectionName connection string.

public BaseBusinessSqlRepository()

Methods

ExecuteNonQuery(string, SqlParameter[])

Executes a non-query, routing through the active UoW connection/transaction when available.

protected void ExecuteNonQuery(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters)

Parameters

query string
parameters SqlParameter[]

ExecuteReader<T>(string, SqlParameter[], Func<SqlDataReader, T>)

Executes a reader query on the active UoW connection when enrolled; otherwise opens a new connection.

protected T ExecuteReader<T>(string query, SqlParameter[] parameters, Func<SqlDataReader, T> map)

Parameters

query string
parameters SqlParameter[]
map Func<SqlDataReader, T>

T

T

ExecuteScalar<T>(string, SqlParameter[])

Executes a scalar query on the active UoW connection when enrolled; otherwise opens a new connection.
